task_completion.description: Open the raw recipe manual and the style guide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a word processor (e.g., Calligra Words or LibreOffice) open with 'recipe_manual_raw.odt' and a text editor or viewer open with 'recipe_style_guide.txt'.

task_completion.description: Apply formatting to the main title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main title 'LUMIÈRE BISTRO: STANDARDIZED RECIPE MANUAL' is visibly formatted (e.g., larger font, centered, or distinct style) at the beginning of the document.
A Table of Contents section is visible and formatted, listing the four recipes (Bouillabaisse, Duck Confit, Beef Bourguignon, Ratatouille).

task_completion.description: Apply formatting to recipe titles and section headings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Recipe titles (e.g., 'Bouillabaisse') and section titles ('Ingredients', 'Instructions', 'Allergens') are formatted as distinct headings, standing out from the body text.
Metadata such as Yield, Prep Time, and Cook Time are organized into visible table structures (with rows/columns) for the recipes.
Ingredients and instructions are formatted using proper list tools (bullet points or numbered lists) under their respective headings.

task_completion.description: Format allergen warnings and save the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Allergen phrases (e.g., 'Allergens: Fish, Shellfish, Allium') are visibly formatted (e.g., bolded, italicized, or highlighted). The document shows signs of being saved (e.g., clicking the save icon, no unsaved indicator in the title bar).

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Formatting is done within a graphical word processor application (like Calligra Words or LibreOffice Writer), not via terminal commands, python scripts, or raw text manipulation.

integrity.description: The agent used actual formatting tools rather than plain text workarounds.
integrity.visual_evidence: Tables are actual GUI table objects, lists use the word processor's list features (bullets/numbers), and headings use style/font controls, rather than just typing spaces, dashes, or markdown symbols.

integrity.description: The original recipe content was preserved during formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: The core text of the recipes (e.g., specific ingredients like 'mussels', 'duck fat', 'Burgundy wine', 'eggplants') remains intact and was not replaced by generic placeholders.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Main title: 'LUMIÈRE BISTRO: STANDARDIZED RECIPE MANUAL'. Recipes: Bouillabaisse, Duck Confit, Beef Bourguignon, Ratatouille. Sections per recipe: Ingredients, Instructions, Allergens. Allergen phrases to look for: 'Allergens: Fish, Shellfish, Allium', 'Allergens: Allium', 'Allergens: Allium, Sulfites', 'Allergens: Allium, Nightshades'. Metadata to be formatted into tables includes Yield, Prep Time, and Cook Time.
